title: Catching Up 闲聊近况
scene: 两个好久不见的朋友在街上偶遇。

lines.en: Grace? Is that you? I haven't seen you for a long time!
lines.zh: 格蕾丝？是你吗？好久没见到你了！

lines.en: Oliver! What a surprise! How have you been?
lines.zh: 奥利弗！真惊喜！你最近好吗？

lines.en: I've been good! I started learning guitar.
lines.zh: 我很好！我开始学吉他了。

lines.en: Really? That's so cool! How's it going?
lines.zh: 真的吗？太酷了！学得怎么样？

lines.en: It's hard, but I really enjoy it. What about you?
I've been busy with swimming practice.
Are you on the school team now?
Yes! We have a competition next month.
lines.zh: 是的！我们下个月有比赛。

lines.en: Good luck! Let's meet up for coffee sometime.
lines.zh: 祝你好运！我们找时间聚聚吧。

lines.en: I'd love that! Here's my phone number. Call me!
lines.zh: 我很乐意！这是我的电话号码。打给我！
